name: Pastel Realm
description: Pastel Realm is a dreamy dimension where every skyline is blush pink, every cobblestone is lavender, and the locals dress exclusively in soft, cloud-like hues. Travelers come here to decompress, shop gradient-dyed silks, and attend floating runway shows above cotton candy clouds.

name: Noir District
description: The Noir District is a perpetually midnight city draped in velvet shadows and gold lamplight, where fashion is dark, dramatic, and deliberately mysterious. Its underground ateliers craft avant-garde black looks while jazz echoes through cobblestone alleys.

name: Plastika
description: Plastika is a futuristic eco-city built entirely from reclaimed and upcycled plastic, where sustainable fashion is not just a trend — it's the law. Neon-tinted skyscrapers tower over streets lined with designers who turn ocean waste into wearable art.
